title: Profile Card
description: The Profile Card is a dynamic web application built with Node.js that generates and displays personalized user profile cards with an elegant, modern design. The card features user information including profile images, contact details, social media links, and bio sections, all rendered through efficient server-side templating. The responsive design ensures seamless display across all devices while maintaining fast load times and optimal performance.

title: UI Designs
description: During my time at Born Digital, I created a collection of user interface designs using Figma, showcasing modern aesthetics and user-friendly layouts. Each design is crafted to enhance user experience, featuring responsive elements, intuitive navigation, and visually appealing components. The designs cover a range of applications, from mobile apps to web interfaces, demonstrating my ability to create engaging and functional user interfaces that meet the needs of diverse users.

title: Variant Generator
description: Variant Generator is a versatile tool built with JavaScript that allows users of the company, to fill in the inputs in order to generate a XML file for testing. The responsive design ensures seamless display across all devices.
